case_title: CANDIDA DUAZO VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-03-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
